title: festuca stricta subsp. trachyphylla
intro: Festuca stricta subsp. trachyphylla, also known as hard fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of hard fescue include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
